scripts.electron:pack: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:win: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:mac: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:all: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --win --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:publish: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:win: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:mac: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:all: node generate-icons.cjs && vite build && electron-builder --win --mac --publish always
